{{/* Usage in markdown: {{< code-tabs >}} {{< tab lang="kotlin" filename="MyTest.kt" >}} val mock = openAiMock() {{< /tab >}} {{< tab lang="java" filename="MyTest.java" >}} OpenAiMock mock = openAiMock(); {{< /tab >}} {{< /code-tabs >}} Attributes: lang — "kotlin" | "java" | any Chroma language key filename — optional filename shown in header */}} {{ $id := printf "ct-%s" (now.UnixNano | string) }} {{ .Scratch.Set "codeTabsWrapperId" $id }} {{ .Scratch.Set "codeTabsPanelIndex" 0 }}
{{ .Inner }}
